issues.sample: Traveling about 35mph with no cars around, the brakes applied, no throttle response, and little steering.  Warning lights illuminated and couldn't move car until turned off ignition and restarted.  Dealer showed no codes and shows no record of it occurring.  This symptom mirrors

We have owned the car for nearly 2 years and the rear cross traffic alert has never worked, even when cars and pedestrians are walking behind the vehicle.  BMW says nothing is wrong.  Many other drivers report the exact same issue with their BMW.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Bmw X1 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 30 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (63% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
